skills.name: sy-changelog
skills.description: Use when recording, merging, viewing, or clearing structured feature-level change logs for downstream commit/release message generation.

skills.name: sy-code-insight
skills.description: Use when project/task/module understanding is required before planning or implementation, and analysis artifacts must be persisted under `.ai/` for session continuity.

skills.name: sy-constraints/appsec
skills.description: Use when touching auth, input boundaries, APIs, secrets, or sensitive data so baseline application security controls are enforced.

skills.name: sy-constraints/debug
skills.description: Use when a bug, failing check, or unexpected behavior appears and a fix is being considered.

skills.name: sy-constraints/execution
skills.description: Use when planning or executing phased work to enforce source-of-truth, phase gates, validation gates, and rollback boundaries.

skills.name: sy-constraints/language
skills.description: Use when defining, editing, or auditing workflow rules so language partitions and RFC keyword discipline stay consistent.

skills.name: sy-constraints/phase
skills.description: Use when planning or executing multi-node work to enforce DAG safety, phase boundary contracts, checkpoints, and resumable flow.

skills.name: sy-constraints/research
skills.description: Use when deciding whether to adopt, extend, or build a solution before writing net-new code or adding dependencies.

skills.name: sy-constraints/review
skills.description: Use when handling user or reviewer feedback so each item is clarified, classified, implemented, and verified with evidence.

skills.name: sy-constraints/safety
skills.description: Use when any risky command or sensitive operation is considered, so explicit confirmation and safe alternatives are enforced.

skills.name: sy-constraints
skills.description: Use when running any sy-* workflow to load minimal constraint skills and enforce hook-backed hard guards.

skills.name: sy-constraints/testing
skills.description: Use when implementing behavior changes or bug fixes so TDD order, anti-pattern gates, coverage baselines, and behavior validation are enforced.

skills.name: sy-constraints/truth
skills.description: Use when making factual or technical claims that require citation, freshness checks, and evidence-before-claim discipline.

skills.name: sy-constraints/verify
skills.description: Use when preparing any fixed/completed/ready claim so verification evidence is fresh, complete, and auditable.

skills.name: sy-constraints/workspace
skills.description: Use when setting branch/worktree/sandbox context so baseline health and isolation are validated before execution.

skills.name: sy-debug
skills.description: Use when verify, review, build, test, or runtime failures require structured root-cause debugging before any fix is applied.

skills.name: sy-design
skills.description: Use when discovery, benchmark, or ideation outputs must converge into an approved technical design before planning.

skills.name: sy-development-workflow
skills.description: Use when legacy prompts reference the old unified development workflow skill and routing must be forwarded to the new split sy-* workflow skills.

skills.name: sy-doc-sync
skills.description: Use when a module-level `README.AI.md` must be created or incrementally synchronized with current code and interfaces.

skills.name: sy-executing-plans
skills.description: Use when an approved plan exists and implementation should proceed node-by-node with split execution operations (node/test/verify) and checkpointed modes.

skills.name: sy-git-commit
skills.description: Use when user explicitly requests commit or release message generation after code changes are complete and reviewed.

skills.name: sy-ideation
skills.description: Use when requirements are creative, ambiguous, or not yet decision-ready and you need structured ideation to produce an approvable design before planning.

skills.name: sy-receiving-code-review
skills.description: Use when review feedback must be processed item-by-item with verify-first discipline, classification, and per-item evidence before proceeding.

skills.name: sy-requesting-code-review
skills.description: Use when verification is READY and a structured evidence-first code review must produce a PASS, CONCERNS, REWORK, or FAIL verdict.

skills.name: sy-verification-before-completion
skills.description: Use when all planned nodes are complete and a full session-level verification gate must run before review or completion claims.

skills.name: sy-workflow-constraints
skills.description: Use when executing sy-* workflow phases to enforce minimal constraint loading, phase gates, and hook-backed hard controls.

skills.name: sy-workflow
skills.description: Use when users want a single entry to start, route, resume, or inspect the sy-* phased development workflow.

skills.name: sy-worktree
skills.description: Use when workflow execution requires isolated workspace preparation, baseline checks, and explicit workspace disclosure before planning or implementation.

skills.name: sy-writing-plans
skills.description: Use when an approved design exists and you need an executable implementation plan before writing code.
